pages.text: My name is Lolo. I have many friends. Come out with me to say hello!

blocks.text: My name is Lolo. I have many friends. Come out with me to say hello!

pages.text: Hello Sun, big and bright. You fill the day with your bright light.

blocks.text: Hello Sun, big and bright. You fill the day with your bright light.

pages.text: Hello Grass, soft and green. You give us all a place to play.

blocks.text: Hello Grass, soft and green. You give us all a place to play.

pages.text: Hello Sky, broad and blue. You fill the sky with the colour blue.

blocks.text: Hello Sky, broad and blue. You fill the sky with the colour blue.

pages.text: Hello Moon, up in the dark. You make the night not so dark.

blocks.text: Hello Moon, up in the dark. You make the night not so dark.

pages.text: Hello Star, big and white. You make the night so very nice.

blocks.text: Hello Star, big and white. You make the night so very nice.

pages.text: Hello Wind, strong and free. You blow things around, and make it cool.

blocks.text: Hello Wind, strong and free. You blow things around, and make it cool.

pages.text: Hello Rain, pouring down. You bring water, and cool our ground.

blocks.text: Hello Rain, pouring down. You bring water, and cool our ground.

pages.text: Hello Lightning, from high above. Your bright flashing light gives us a fright. Hello Thunder, roaring in the rain. You make a boom noise, so very loud.

blocks.text: Hello Lightning, from high above. Your bright flashing light gives us a fright.
Hello Thunder, roaring in the rain. You make a boom noise, so very loud.

pages.text: Hello Dew, drops of water. You make the ground soft and wet.

blocks.text: Hello Dew, drops of water. You make the ground soft and wet.

pages.text: Hello Tree, big and strong. You give us shade and fruit to eat.

blocks.text: Hello Tree, big and strong. You give us shade and fruit to eat.

pages.text: Hello Bird, flying in the sky. You fill our days with lovely songs.

blocks.text: Hello Bird, flying in the sky. You fill our days with lovely songs.

pages.text: Hello You, reading this book. Now you’ve met my friends, please show me yours!

blocks.text: Now you’ve met my friends, please show me yours!
